errors_encountered.error: Build failed due to unresolved reference 'cleanHtml'
errors_encountered.solution: Method in HtmlCleaner is named 'clean'. Search & replaced in all extractors.

decisions_made.decision: Map HTML tags to newlines before parsing
decisions_made.reason: Preserves paragraph structure, line breaks, and lists instead of collapsing to single line

decisions_made.decision: Switched to String-based cleaning instead of DOM removal
decisions_made.reason: Avoids doc.clone() and reduces RAM usage significantly
Regex is ~10-100x faster than DOM parsing if the pattern matches early
